creator: ultima@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Marco Beishuizen from comment #4)
Can you please give a little details on this these patch? In the pkg-list, all filenames were changed and more added. Definitely is due to the mail/alpine changes.

I'll investigate this more tomorrow, but the mail/alpine patch in bug #219895 will probably need a little bit of rework for the slave port.
